title: The Antikythera Mechanism: Diving for Ancient Computers
subtitle: How a 1901 sponge-diving accident rewrote computing history.
description: Jane Doe sits down with Dr. Maria Katsaros to unpack how the latest Antikythera expedition changed the story of ancient computation.
description_html:
Jane Doe sits down with Dr. Maria Katsaros to unpack how the latest Antikythera expedition changed the story of ancient computation.

They trace the 1901 discovery, the engineering hidden inside the mechanism, and what the 2024 dive season revealed about missing fragments.
summary: Dr. Katsaros on the 2024 Antikythera expedition.
show_notes_markdown:
## Links
- [Antikythera Mechanism Research Project](https://example.org/antikythera)
- [Recovered gear catalog](https://example.org/catalog)

## Takeaways
- Ancient instrumentation still challenges modern assumptions.
- Better underwater imaging changes the pace of scholarship.
